name: claudit
description: Audit the current Codex thread with Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Audit the current Codex thread with Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Claudit installs a Codex hook that handles $claudit prompts, sends the current Codex session log to Claude Code, wraps the review in a caution template, and injects it as additional context for the same model turn. The injected context tells Codex that the triggering prompt was handled by Claudit as data for Claude.
